## Contributor checklist

- [ ] I added or updated focused tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I preserved fail-closed approval and exact-identity boundaries.
- [ ] I did not include credentials, private source, personal data, or generated release artifacts.
- [ ] I updated user-facing documentation where behavior changed.
- [ ] My commits include a Developer Certificate of Origin sign-off (`git commit -s`).
